form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (10m 3) over 2200m at this track, beaten 8 m by Beta Prepare (2:45.20) on April 2 at $25.90. Showed ability the run before when he won by 3.5 m (20m 1) at Manawatu (3:08.10) beating Blue Chip Lou in 3yo+ on March 12 at $9.60. Could be worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (25m 1) over 2200m at this track beaten 14 m by Beta Prepare (2:45.20) on April 2 at $8.50. Strips fitter and is a solid chance.
